MemberSignature.Value: public virtual Azure.Response<Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyAssignmentResource> GetPolicyAssignment (Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier scope, string policyAssignmentName, string expand = default, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class Azure.Response`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.PolicyAssignmentResource> GetPolicyAssignment(class Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier scope, string policyAssignmentName, string expand, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed

Docs.param: The scope of the resource collection to get.
The name of the policy assignment to get.
Comma-separated list of additional properties to be included in the response. Supported values are 'LatestDefinitionVersion, EffectiveDefinitionVersion'.
The cancellation token to use.
Docs.summary: This operation retrieves a single policy assignment, given its name and the scope it was created at.
Docs.exception: is an empty string, and was expected to be non-empty.
